ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Client_Identifier__c , 'Canaccede')))&&($Setup.Application_Config_Settings__c.Run_Insolvency_Status_Validations__c == True) && ($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || (CONTAINS($Profile.Name,"CFG"))) && (ISNEW() || ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Status__c)) && (Not( (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "New") && ISNEW()) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "For Owner Review") && (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"New") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Details Provided") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Package Generated") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"No PoC Required") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Wait / Hold")) || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Trustee Followup")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Wait / Hold") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "No PoC Required") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Trustee Followup") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Trustee Followup") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Wait / Hold")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Claim Filed") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Package Generated")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Claim Withdrawn") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Withdraw PoC")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Claim Filed")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "New") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "New") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"No PoC Required")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Trustee Followup") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"No PoC Required")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "No PoC Required") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Details Provided")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Package Generated")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "For Owner Review") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Claim Filed")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"No PoC Required")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Package Generated") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Trustee Followup") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Details Provided")) || ((ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Sent to collections") && ((ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Annulled")) || (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Refused")) || (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Withdrawn")) || (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Claim Withdrawn"))))) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Withdraw PoC") && NOT( ISNEW())) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "BOT Review") && NOT( ISNEW())) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid Insolvency Account Processing Status change
